one_time_description: Other revenue of $4,499,502 significantly exceeded budget of $37,060 and Government of Canada revenue of $3,593,571 with no budget - likely COVID-19 related or one-time federal transfers
economic_notes: 25% interest in Hayu Fishing Limited Partnership and 25% of Hayu Fishing Ltd, both with year ends December 31, 2020. HFLP had total revenue of $1,012,110 and net income of $834,633. BCFN Gaming revenue of $674,826.
notes: Total revenue of $21.4M vastly exceeded budget of $3.8M primarily due to $3.6M from Government of Canada (unbudgeted) and $4.5M in other revenue vs budget of $37K - likely COVID-19 related federal transfers. Annual surplus of $15.6M is exceptional compared to budget of $256K and prior year $1.1M. isc_funding could not be separately identified from Nuu-chah-nulth Tribal Council funding; total_government_transfers includes Nuu-chah-nulth Tribal Council ($8,869,543), Province of BC ($2,879,272), CMHC ($33,016), Government of Canada ($3,593,571). Restricted cash reserves noted as not adequately funded at year end. Segments: Operations $5,727,363; Enterprise $31,601; Social Housing $47,861. No remuneration schedule included in pages provided.
